title: US CPI Forecast Snapshot — June 2026
summary: Haziran CPI headline +0.10% m/m (consensus +0.25%) bekleniyor. Brent $72.56, WTI ~$76.5 ile Haziran'da -25% düşüş = energy deflasyonu derinleşiyor. FOMC 16-17 Haziran'da hawkish hold (Warsh 'price stability', dot plot 3.75%-4.00% y/e 2026, +25bp). Core +0.20% stabil. PCE raporu bu hafta (26-27 Haziran). DXY 101.50, 10Y 4.50%.
baseCase: Below-consensus headline CPI on oil collapse; core stable but FOMC hawkish limits market reaction

release.name: CPI
release.thesis: Brent $72.56, WTI ~$76.5 (Haziran -25%) = energy deflasyonu dominant. FOMC hawkish hold (Warsh 'price stability', dot plot 3.75%-4.00% y/e 2026 = +25bp). Core stabil (+0.20%) ama DXY 101.50 = import deflasyon baskısı. PCE 26-27 Haziran.

scenarios.label: Base case
scenarios.outcome: Headline +0.10% m/m, Core +0.20% m/m — below consensus on oil deflation
scenarios.marketReadthrough: 10Y yields fade slightly (4.45-4.50%), DXY 100-101 stabil. Airlines (UAL) and chemicals (LYB) rally on jet fuel/naphtha margin expansion. Energy (XLE) and gold (GLD) under pressure. Tech (NVDA) limited upside due to FOMC hawkishness.
scenarios.invalidation: Iran deal collapses, WTI spikes above $85, or core services re-accelerate above +0.30%.

scenarios.label: Hotter inflation surprise
scenarios.outcome: Headline +0.25%+ m/m, Core +0.30%+ m/m — oil rebounds, services sticky
scenarios.marketReadthrough: 10Y yields spike (4.55%+), DXY 101.5+. Tech (NVDA) and REITs (AMT) selloff. USD long, energy (XLE) short-cover rally. Gold (GLD) squeeze.
scenarios.invalidation: Hot print driven by one-off energy component; core services actually stable.

scenarios.label: Cooler disinflation impulse
scenarios.outcome: Headline +0.0% m/m, Core +0.15% m/m — oil collapse fully captured, DXY compression
scenarios.marketReadthrough: 10Y yields drop (4.35-4.40%), DXY 99.5-100. Growth (QQQ) rallies, airlines (UAL) +10-15%. Homebuilders (DHI) on mortgage relief. Energy (XLE) -5%.
scenarios.invalidation: Market already priced a benign outcome; FOMC hawkish tone prevents rally.

setups.bias: Long duration on cooler or inline core
setups.trigger: Core CPI <= +0.20% and services ex-shelter stable; WTI stays below $78
setups.invalidation: Sticky core services above +0.30% with wages re-accelerating; PCE hot this week.

setups.bias: Cautious — FOMC hawkish limits multiple expansion
setups.trigger: 10Y yield drops below 4.45% after release and DXY softens below 100
setups.invalidation: Hot CPI with 10Y yield above 4.55% and DXY above 101.5.

setups.bias: Long — jet fuel collapse + summer demand
setups.trigger: WTI $72-78 and CPI headline soft; summer travel bookings strong
setups.invalidation: Iran deal collapses, WTI above $85, or travel demand disappoints.

setups.bias: Short — oil supply glut, Iran exports resuming, demand weak
setups.trigger: WTI below $78 and Hormuz traffic normalizes; API inventory weak demand
setups.invalidation: Iran deal collapses, Israel attacks, or OPEC+ cuts production.

setups.bias: Short — DXY 101 + FOMC hawkish + real yields rising
setups.trigger: DXY above 100.85 and 10Y yield above 4.50% on CPI day
setups.invalidation: DXY drops below 99.5 or geopolitical shock (Iran deal collapse).

watchItems.label: Fed path / Warsh
watchItems.note: FOMC hawkish hold on 16-17 Jun. Warsh 'price stability' tone. 3/18 hike, 5/18 hike 50bp.

watchItems.label: 10Y UST
watchItems.note: Key regime line. Below 4.45% = growth rally. Above 4.55% = risk-off. Oil pulling down, FOMC pushing up.

watchItems.label: WTI / Brent Oil
watchItems.note: Haziran -25%. Brent 72.56 (25 Jun). API inventory weak demand. Hormuz geçişleri normalleşiyor. $70 line = headline CPI 0.0% risk.

watchItems.label: PCE Report
watchItems.note: Fed's preferred inflation gauge. PCE soft = dovish sentiment. PCE hot = hawkish. Affects market pricing, not CPI directly.

watchItems.label: DXY
watchItems.note: Near 52-week high 101.80. FOMC hawkish + safe haven. Import deflation pressure on core goods.

keyDrivers: Oil collapse: Brent $72.56, WTI -25% in June = gasoline CPI -7% m/m. Energy deflation is the dominant headline driver. API inventory weak demand.
FOMC hawkish hold: Warsh's first meeting. Dot plot 3.75%-4.00% y/e 2026 = +25bp. 3/18 members expect hike, 5/18 expect 50bp hikes. 'Price stability' language.
Iran deal progress: Hormuz traffic normalizing, 3 supertankers passed. Supply glut risk = oil downside.
DXY 101.50: Strong dollar = import deflation on core goods. Partially offsets PPI passthrough.
Core services sticky: Retail sales strong (+0.9% May) = consumer demand resilient. Airline fares, recreation = upside risk.
risks: Iran deal collapse: Nuclear inspectors denied, Israel/Lebanon tensions, US Congress opposition. WTI $85+ = CPI revision.
PCE hot this week: If core PCE +0.3%+ m/m, hawkish sentiment intensifies, 10Y yields spike, DXY strengthens.
FOMC hawkish limits reaction: Market may 'sell the rally' even on soft CPI. Warsh 'one data point' rhetoric.
Demand weakness: API inventory weak demand = crude demand concerns. If global recession fears rise, oil and risk assets both fall.
Shelter lag: Zillow/Apartment List slowing but BLS 6-12 month lag. Faster deceleration = core downside surprise.
